nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 九州 (日本)
nodes.summary: 九州 (日本)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括黑脸琵鹭、銅長尾雉、长嘴剑鸻等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 本州
nodes.summary: 本州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括銅長尾雉、普通秧鸡、长嘴剑鸻等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 日本柳莺
nodes.summary: 日本柳莺（Japanese leaf warbler，学名 Phylloscopus xanthodryas），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于本州、九州 (日本)、婆罗洲，常见栖息地包括灌丛、湿地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Japanese leaf warbler breeds mainly in Japan, from Honshu to Kyushu. In the non-breeding season, it is found in areas such as Taiwan, the Philippines, Borneo, Java, and in small numbers as far east as the Moluccas. It also winters in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, and parts of China

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Japanese leaf warbler breeds mainly in Japan, from Honshu to Kyushu. In the non-breeding season, it is found in areas such as Taiwan, the Philippines, Borneo, Java, and in small numbers as far east as the Moluccas. It also winters in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, and parts of China

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Japanese leaf warbler is a migratory bird. After breeding, it moves south or southwest through eastern China and nearby islands. It spends the winter in Taiwan, the Philippines, Borneo, and Java. Migration takes place from August to November, and the birds return to Japan in mid-May. Arrival often happens within one or two weeks, although timing can be confused with other related species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It nests in thick undergrowth, rhododendron bushes, and scrub above the tree line. In winter, it is seen below 1800 meters in woodlands, rainforests, secondary growth, plantations, and gardens. It also occurs in shrublands, wetlands, and cultivated areas, as well as artificial terrestrial habitats. The species depends on thick vegetation for nesting and foraging
